title: Oman oil price rises by $5.53
summary: This represents an increase of US$5.53 compared to yesterday's price of US$99.26 per barrel
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
PHOTO

Muscat – The official price of Oman crude oil for June delivery reached US$104.79 per barrel today.

This represents an increase of US$5.53 compared to yesterday's price of US$99.26 per barrel.

It is worth noting that the monthly average price for Oman crude oil for April delivery stood at US$68.15 per barrel, marking a rise of US$5.98 from the March delivery price.
